meaning: <拉> Victoria Regina Imperatrix (英国) 维多利亚女王及女皇(=Victoria,Queen and Empress)
examples: ABSTRACT: Objective To explore the characteristics of vibration response imaging (VRI) in chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD).
Seminars: From time to time, VRI sponsors international seminars on various aspects of the research work as it applies to the actual experience of Vipassana.
The Vipassana Research Institute (VRI) was established in 1985 for the purpose of conducting research into the sources and applications of the Vipassana Meditation Technique.
The VRI equipment, sold by vendor Advanced Ag Systems out of Dothan, Ala.
